# ocp_staas_group (Resource)

Groups individual StaaS volumes together so they share export policy, data protection policy, tier & QOS



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `data_protection_policy_id` (String)
- `name` (String)
- `project_id` (String)
- `protocol` (String)
- `tier_id` (String)
- `vserver_id` (String)

### Optional

- `nfs_exports` (Attributes Set) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--nfs_exports))
- `note` (String)

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.

<a id="nestedatt--nfs_exports"></a>
### Nested Schema for `nfs_exports`

Optional:

- `ip_id` (String)
- `subnet_id` (String)
